hero.title: Give a Second Chance to Those Who Need It Most
hero.description: We connect loving families with pets in need of a home. Every adoption saves a life and brings joy to your home.
hero.slide1_desc: Every animal deserves a loving home. Adopt and change a life.
hero.slide2_desc: Your report can save a life. Act now and help an animal in need.
hero.slide3_desc: With your help we can rescue, rehabilitate and find homes for more animals.

proceso.title: Our Adoption Process
proceso.subtitle: Simple steps to find your new best friend
proceso.step1_desc: Browse our available pets and find the one that steals your heart.
proceso.step2_desc: Fill out our adoption form and tell us about yourself and your home.
proceso.step3_desc: Meet your potential new family member and complete the adoption process.
proceso.step4_desc: Give your new pet the love and care they deserve in their forever home.

testimonios.title: What Our Adopters Say
testimonios.subtitle: Real stories from families who have found their perfect companion

maria.name: María González
maria.text: Adopting Luna was the best decision we ever made. She has brought so much joy to our family!

carlos.name: Carlos Rodríguez
carlos.text: Being part of this rescue organization has been incredibly rewarding. Every life we save matters.

ana.name: Ana López
ana.text: Their dedication to animal welfare is inspiring. We've seen countless success stories.

cta.title: Ready to Make a Difference?
cta.description: Join our mission to save lives and find loving homes for pets in need.

mascotas_subtitle: Meet the pets waiting for their forever home
sin_mascotas: No pets available at the moment. Check back soon!

eventos.subtitulo: Participate in our events and be part of the change

aliados.subtitulo: Veterinaries and foundations working tirelessly for animal welfare
aliados.fundaciones_sub: Rescuing and giving a second chance
aliados.sin_veterinarias: More veterinaries will join this cause soon
aliados.sin_fundaciones: More foundations will join this cause soon
aliados.mensaje_footer: Every ally is a step towards a better future for animals

reportar.title: Did you see an animal in danger?
reportar.description: Your report can save a life. Act now and help an animal in need.
